name: myfans
description: MyFans monorepo — frontend, backend, and Soroban contracts

scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend && npm ci --prefix contract
scripts.build: npm run build:contract && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:contract
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
